mapper.select: SELECT pr.prepay_order_no AS sessionNo, pr.prepay_order_no AS prepayOrderNo, pr.payment_order_id AS paymentOrderId, pr.order_no AS orderNo, pr.bill_no AS billNo, pr.customer_name AS customerName, pr.cashier_title AS cashierTitle, pr.pay_scene AS terminal, CONCAT('¥', FORMAT(pr.amount, 2)) AS amount, CASE WHEN pr.cashier_status IN ('已完成', '支付成功') THEN pr.cashier_status WHEN pr.expires_at < NOW() THEN '已失效' ELSE pr.cashier_status END AS sessionStatus, CASE WHEN pr.cashier_status IN ('已完成', '支付成功') THEN 'success' WHEN pr.expires_at < NOW() THEN 'danger' ELSE pr.cashier_status_type END AS sessionStatusType, DATE_FORMAT(pr.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS createdAt, DATE_FORMAT(pr.expires_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS expiresAt FROM t_prepay_order pr ORDER BY pr.created_at DESC
